programme.title: Bratia proti prírode
programme.desc: Režim prežitia Bratia Chris a Casey sa vracajú do Saskatchewanu, kde opäť otestujú svoje sily. Nebude to vôbec jednoduché, keďže nedokážu nájsť vhodný úkryt a ani prvú schránku so zásobami. Americký dokumentárny seriál (2018)., (dokument), 2016

programme.title: Bratia proti prírode
programme.desc: Plán hry Chris a Casey sa utáborili, no chlad sa blíži a preto si musia nájsť nejakú potravu. Počas lovu na losy sa im míňa energia a tak musia rýchlo prísť na to, ako získať potravu, inak budú hladovať. Americký dokumentárny seriál (2018)., (dokument), 2016

programme.title: Bratia proti prírode
programme.desc: Krutý vietor V Saskatchewane je mrazivé počasie a kvôli silnému vetru a búrkam sa musia Chris a Casey poponáhľať a nájsť teplý úkryt a jedlo ešte pred tým, než sa im minú všetky zvyšné sily. Americký dokumentárny seriál (2018)., (dokument), 2016

programme.title: Dvě tváře lásky (65)
programme.desc: Příběh chudé dívky Pauliny, která se stará o těžce nemocnou matku a netuší, že její život brzy převrátí nečekané setkání. Osud ji do cesty přivede bohatou dvojnici Paolu. Dostane nabídku, která změní osudy obou žen. Příběh plný lásky, intrik, tajemství a osudových rozhodnutí. Mexická telenovela (1998). Hrají G. Spanic, F. Colunga, E. Lizalde, L. Zapata, T. Guízar a další, (seriál, dráma, romantika), stereo, Mexiko, 1999

programme.title: Rodinné vztahy (5)
programme.desc: Životní příběhy plné bolesti, šokujících odhalení, viny a odpuštění, lásky a nenávisti. Ale i smutné začátky mají šťastné konce, (zábava), stereo

programme.title: Vím, že nic nevím
programme.desc: Zábavná show Vím, že nic nevím přináší originální kvíz, kde znalosti ustupují zábavě a instinkt rozhoduje o vítězství. Tři komici a dva hosté soupeří v nevyzpytatelném kvízu, kde nikdo nezná správnou odpověď. Tipování, improvizace a absurdní logika jsou jedinými zbraněmi proti otázkám z říše náhodných faktů, (zábava)

programme.title: Babica vs. Sapík
programme.desc: Dnes vaříme oběd pro rodinu za dvě stovky Když dva dělají jedno, není to vždycky totéž. Stejná sada základních surovin a zcela odlišná jídla. Veřejností milovaný kuchař Jirka Babica se vrací, ale nebude to mít vůbec jednoduché, na záda mu bude dýchat uznávaný nestor české gastronomie, kuchař Jaroslav Sapík, (zábava), stereo

programme.title: Vaříme s Jirkou Babicou
programme.desc: Pánev tří barev. Kotlety na pivu. Cibulový koláč Jiří Babica představuje jednoduché a chutné recepty s tím, co máte doma, (zábava), stereo

programme.title: Inga Lindström: Zamilovaní doktoři VII (5)
programme.desc: (Zamilovaní doktoři), Julie odjíždí na léto za svým přítelem, venkovským lékařem. Po příjezdu ji čeká nemilé překvapení. Magnus odjíždí na seminář a představí jí svého zástupce, lékaře a světoběžníka Henrika, do kterého se neplánovaně zamiluje... Německý romantický film (2010). Hrají E. de Vos, R. Seeliger, H. Blank, M. May, M. Mendl a další. Režie P. Weissflog, (seriál, dráma, romantika), stereo, Nemecko, 2010

programme.title: Doktorka Kellerová (10)
programme.desc: Závěr první řady kriminálního seriálu (2016) z lékařského prostředí. Doktorka Lýdie Kellerová začíná nový život v Praze. Řeší případy, které mohou být, nebo jsou na hranici trestného činu... V hlavních rolích K. Brožová, J. Šťastný, M. Etzler a M. Vašut. Režie A. Vlk, (seriál, dráma, krimi), stereo

programme.title: Pán elfů
programme.desc: Na poslední kmen chytrých a mírumilovných hobitů zaútočil zlý kmen mužů z Java - kanibalů, kteří jezdí na dracích a jejich posvátným zvířetem je varan. Na svobodě zůstal pouze hobit Goben, jeho sestra a otec. Mají šanci najít a zachránit ty, kteří přežili? Americký fantasy film (2012). Hrají Bai Ling, Sun Korng, Srogn, Khom Lyly, Ch. Judge, J. programme.title: English United
programme.desc: Creative American teacher and blogger Luke Priddy introduces the intricacies of the American English and the cultural specifics of the United States.

programme.title: City Grammar
programme.desc: City Grammar – learning and sightseeing at the same time. English Grammar with elementary examples straight from the very heart of London.

programme.title: Idiom Kitchen
programme.desc: Idiom Kitchen is a vibrant and engaging project that will introduce you to English idioms, teach you how to express your thoughts correctly and colourfully, and expand your vocabulary. Each episode will introduce you to an English idiomatic expression, its meaning, and how it is used in speech, using amusing and unexpected example sentences.

programme.title: Irregular Verbs
programme.desc: Irregular Verbs – is a series of musical animated cartoons that will help you memorise irregular verb forms in a fun and easy way, thanks to specially written songs that encourage you to quickly learn the necessary words.

programme.title: Coffee Chat
programme.desc: Coffee Chat – is a series of animated films where you can learn a huge amount of thematic vocabulary with the characters having light conversations on various topics over a cup of coffee.

programme.title: Wrong&Right
programme.desc: Wrong&Right – is a series of short animated videos that will show you the most common mistakes in English grammar, phonetics and vocabulary and help you avoid them in your own speech.

programme.title: Life Around
programme.desc: Life Around – a series of animated films that will help you learn and memorize basic collocations and phrases for communicating on everyday topics and describing everyday situations.

programme.desc: City Grammar – learning and sightseeing at the same time. English Grammar with elementary examples straight from the very heart of London.

programme.title: Program z Domu modlitieb a chvál v Kansas City
programme.desc: Výber z bohoslužieb a modlitebných setov zo známeho Domu modlitieb v Kansas City

programme.title: Biblia za rok: 365 Biblických povzbudení
programme.desc: Denné krátke biblické zamyslenie a povzbudenie, ktoré vás sprevádza každým dňom roka

programme.title: Slovo viery - City Church Bratislava
programme.desc: Inšpiratívna relácia prinášajúca praktické biblické vyučovanie, ktoré povzbudzuje k živej viere v každodennom živote. Každá epizóda je zameraná na posilnenie dôvery v Boha, porozumenie Jeho slovu a aplikáciu duchovných princípov do reality dnešného sveta.

programme.title: Detský blok
programme.desc: Vysielanie pre najmenších

programme.title: Slovo viery - Za Kostolom CB Žilina
programme.desc: Inšpiratívna relácia prinášajúca praktické biblické vyučovanie, ktoré povzbudzuje k živej viere v každodennom živote. Každá epizóda je zameraná na posilnenie dôvery v Boha, porozumenie Jeho slovu a aplikáciu duchovných princípov do reality dnešného sveta.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer
programme.desc: Svetovo známa autorka a rečníčka prináša praktické biblické učenie s dôrazom na uzdravenie duše, obnovu mysle a silu viery. Relácia plná úprimnosti, povzbudenia a konkrétnych rád pre každodenný život s Bohom.

programme.title: Nová DNA
programme.desc: Prednášky o problémoch z rôznych životných oblastí. Ľudia tak môžu porozumieť koreňom problémov z biblického pohľadu aj procesu uzdravenia. V každej časti nájdete prednášku z danej oblasti.

programme.title: Relácia DNES
programme.desc: Relácia o kresťanských služobníkoch, ktorí slúžia v rôznych oblastiach. V každej časti je zaujímavý hosť, ktorý rozpráva príbeh o svojom povolaní a Božom konaní vo svojom živote. No takisto tu nájdete aj odpovede na mnohé životné otázky.

programme.title: Slovo viery - ECAV Hybe
programme.desc: Inšpiratívna relácia prinášajúca praktické biblické vyučovanie, ktoré povzbudzuje k živej viere v každodennom živote. Každá epizóda je zameraná na posilnenie dôvery v Boha, porozumenie Jeho slovu a aplikáciu duchovných princípov do reality dnešného sveta.

programme.title: Biblia za rok: 365 Biblických povzbudení
programme.desc: Denné krátke biblické zamyslenie a povzbudenie, ktoré vás sprevádza každým dňom roka

programme.title: Slovo viery - BJB Viera Bratislava
programme.desc: Inšpiratívna relácia prinášajúca praktické biblické vyučovanie, ktoré povzbudzuje k živej viere v každodennom živote. Každá epizóda je zameraná na posilnenie dôvery v Boha, porozumenie Jeho slovu a aplikáciu duchovných princípov do reality dnešného sveta.

programme.title: Biblia za rok
programme.desc: Denné krátke biblické zamyslenie a povzbudenie, ktoré vás sprevádza každým dňom roka

programme.title: ICF Praha
programme.desc: Relácia z prostredia modernej cirkvi ICF, ktorá spája živú hudbu, praktické posolstvá a aktuálne témy dnešnej doby. Program oslovuje hľadajúcich aj veriacich, ktorí túžia žiť vieru autenticky a s dopadom.

programme.title: Biblická lupa
programme.desc: Relácia, ktorá sa pozerá na Písmo „pod lupou“ – prináša hlbšie porozumenie biblických textov, kontextov a významov. Odborné, no zrozumiteľné výklady pomáhajú divákovi objavovať hĺbku Božieho slova a jeho praktický dopad na život.

programme.title: Prochrist
programme.desc: Záznam evanjelizačného vysielania projektu ProChrist – séria posolstiev, hudby a svedectiev, ktorá prináša povzbudenie pre každého hľadajúceho.

programme.title: Campfest
programme.desc: Kresťanský hudobný open air festival, ktorý sa každoročne organizuje na Ranči v Kráľovej Lehote. Je to festival charakterizovaný dynamickými chválami, hlbokým uctievaním, inšpiratívnym slovom, seminármi, svedectvami a hlavne prežívaním Božej prítomnosti. V jednotlivých častiach si tak môžete pozrieť záznamy z programov z hlavných stanov.

programme.title: Biblia za rok: 365 Biblických povzbudení
programme.desc: Denné krátke biblické zamyslenie a povzbudenie, ktoré vás sprevádza každým dňom roka

programme.title: Slovo viery - Slovo Života Bratislava
programme.desc: Inšpiratívna relácia prinášajúca praktické biblické vyučovanie, ktoré povzbudzuje k živej viere v každodennom živote. Každá epizóda je zameraná na posilnenie dôvery v Boha, porozumenie Jeho slovu a aplikáciu duchovných princípov do reality dnešného sveta.

programme.title: Noeland
programme.desc: Kreatívna a hravá relácia určená najmä deťom, ktorá spája biblické hodnoty s pestrým svetom fantázie. Príbehy, pesničky, bábky aj poučenie – Noeland v sebe nesie zábavu aj duchovné povzbudenie pre najmenších.

programme.title: Slovo viery - BJB Košice
programme.desc: Inšpiratívna relácia prinášajúca praktické biblické vyučovanie, ktoré povzbudzuje k živej viere v každodennom živote. Každá epizóda je zameraná na posilnenie dôvery v Boha, porozumenie Jeho slovu a aplikáciu duchovných princípov do reality dnešného sveta.

programme.title: Sid Roth: To je nadprirodzené!
programme.desc: Relácia, ktorá skúma nadprirodzené prejavy Božej moci v životoch ľudí. Svedectvá o zázrakoch, uzdraveniach a duchovných skúsenostiach ukazujú, že Boh aj dnes koná mimoriadnym spôsobom.

programme.title: CAMPFEST blok
programme.desc: Kresťanský hudobný open air festival, ktorý sa každoročne organizuje na Ranči v Kráľovej Lehote. Je to festival charakterizovaný dynamickými chválami, hlbokým uctievaním, inšpiratívnym slovom, seminármi, svedectvami a hlavne prežívaním Božej prítomnosti. V jednotlivých častiach si tak môžete pozrieť záznamy z programov z hlavných stanov.

programme.title: EVS Konferencie
programme.desc: Inšpiratívna konferencia zameraná na vieru, službu, aktuálne výzvy kresťanského života, praktické témy a povzbudenie.

programme.title: Program z Domu modlitieb a chvál v Kansas City
programme.desc: Výber z bohoslužieb a modlitebných setov zo známeho Domu modlitieb v Kansas City

programme.title: Program z Domu modlitieb a chvál v Kansas City
programme.desc: Výber z bohoslužieb a modlitebných setov zo známeho Domu modlitieb v Kansas City

programme.title: Biblia za rok: 365 Biblických povzbudení
programme.desc: Denné krátke biblické zamyslenie a povzbudenie, ktoré vás sprevádza každým dňom roka

programme.title: Slovo viery - AC Košice
programme.desc: Inšpiratívna relácia prinášajúca praktické biblické vyučovanie, ktoré povzbudzuje k živej viere v každodennom živote. Každá epizóda je zameraná na posilnenie dôvery v Boha, porozumenie Jeho slovu a aplikáciu duchovných princípov do reality dnešného sveta.

programme.title: John Bevere
programme.desc: Prednášková relácia s motívom kresťanskej formácie a osobného rastu – svedectvá a praktické aplikácie biblických princípov

programme.title: Ježišov hlas - Randolph Kubíček
programme.desc: Relácia venovaná duchovnému posolstvu, v ktorej Randolph Kubíček učí o citlivosti na volanie Boha

programme.title: 20 minútovka
programme.desc: Jedinečná kresťanská talkshow s inšpiratívnymi ľuďmi a významnými osobnosťami kresťanského života. Pozrieť si môžete skutočné príbehy ľudí, ktorí zažili stretnutie s Bohom, ale aj témy pre každodenný život kresťana. Pripravené sú aj relácie zamerané na osobný rast a témy o financiách a prosperite., (zábava)

programme.title: Nová DNA
programme.desc: Prednášky o problémoch z rôznych životných oblastí. Ľudia tak môžu porozumieť koreňom problémov z biblického pohľadu aj procesu uzdravenia. V každej časti nájdete prednášku z danej oblasti.

programme.title: Relácia DNES
programme.desc: Relácia o kresťanských služobníkoch, ktorí slúžia v rôznych oblastiach. V každej časti je zaujímavý hosť, ktorý rozpráva príbeh o svojom povolaní a Božom konaní vo svojom živote. No takisto tu nájdete aj odpovede na mnohé životné otázky.

programme.title: Godzone chvály
programme.desc: Hudobno-modlitebná relácia, prinášajúca chvály a atmosféru uctievania

programme.title: Biblia za rok: 365 Biblických povzbudení
programme.desc: Denné krátke biblické zamyslenie a povzbudenie, ktoré vás sprevádza každým dňom roka

programme.title: Slovo viery - Slovo Života Brno
programme.desc: Inšpiratívna relácia prinášajúca praktické biblické vyučovanie, ktoré povzbudzuje k živej viere v každodennom živote. Každá epizóda je zameraná na posilnenie dôvery v Boha, porozumenie Jeho slovu a aplikáciu duchovných princípov do reality dnešného sveta.

programme.title: Noeland
programme.desc: Kreatívna a hravá relácia určená najmä deťom, ktorá spája biblické hodnoty s pestrým svetom fantázie. Príbehy, pesničky, bábky aj poučenie – Noeland v sebe nesie zábavu aj duchovné povzbudenie pre najmenších.

programme.title: Slovo viery - BJB Aš
programme.desc: Inšpiratívna relácia prinášajúca praktické biblické vyučovanie, ktoré povzbudzuje k živej viere v každodennom živote. Každá epizóda je zameraná na posilnenie dôvery v Boha, porozumenie Jeho slovu a aplikáciu duchovných princípov do reality dnešného sveta.

programme.title: Relácia DNES
programme.desc: Relácia o kresťanských služobníkoch, ktorí slúžia v rôznych oblastiach. V každej časti je zaujímavý hosť, ktorý rozpráva príbeh o svojom povolaní a Božom konaní vo svojom živote. No takisto tu nájdete aj odpovede na mnohé životné otázky.

programme.title: Konvokácia
programme.desc: Konvokácia je konferenciou zvolania národov, kde sa zišli ľudia z rôznych národov na jednom mieste, aby sa modlili za svoje krajiny. Ročníky 2017 a 2018 sa konali v Bratislave. V jednotlivých častiach nájdete chvály a hlboké vyučovania od služobníkov, ktorí sú medzinárodne známi svojou službou.

programme.title: Cirkev bez hraníc
programme.desc: Dynamická relácia, ktorá prináša posolstvo nádeje, viery a praktického kresťanského života. Kázne a svedectvá zo súčasnej cirkvi, ktorá túži byť relevantná a otvorená pre každého – bez ohľadu na pozadie či hranice.

programme.title: Biblia za rok: 365 Biblických povzbudení
programme.desc: Denné krátke biblické zamyslenie a povzbudenie, ktoré vás sprevádza každým dňom roka

programme.title: Slovo viery - BJB Viera Bratislava
programme.desc: Inšpiratívna relácia prinášajúca praktické biblické vyučovanie, ktoré povzbudzuje k živej viere v každodennom živote. Každá epizóda je zameraná na posilnenie dôvery v Boha, porozumenie Jeho slovu a aplikáciu duchovných princípov do reality dnešného sveta.

programme.title: Biblia za rok
programme.desc: Denné krátke biblické zamyslenie a povzbudenie, ktoré vás sprevádza každým dňom roka

programme.title: ICF Praha
programme.desc: Relácia z prostredia modernej cirkvi ICF, ktorá spája živú hudbu, praktické posolstvá a aktuálne témy dnešnej doby. Program oslovuje hľadajúcich aj veriacich, ktorí túžia žiť vieru autenticky a s dopadom.

programme.title: Biblická lupa
programme.desc: Relácia, ktorá sa pozerá na Písmo „pod lupou“ – prináša hlbšie porozumenie biblických textov, kontextov a významov. Odborné, no zrozumiteľné výklady pomáhajú divákovi objavovať hĺbku Božieho slova a jeho praktický dopad na život.

programme.title: Prochrist
programme.desc: Záznam evanjelizačného vysielania projektu ProChrist – séria posolstiev, hudby a svedectiev, ktorá prináša povzbudenie pre každého hľadajúceho.

programme.title: CampFest
programme.desc: Kresťanský hudobný open air festival, ktorý sa každoročne organizuje na Ranči v Kráľovej Lehote. Je to festival charakterizovaný dynamickými chválami, hlbokým uctievaním, inšpiratívnym slovom, seminármi, svedectvami a hlavne prežívaním Božej prítomnosti. V jednotlivých častiach si tak môžete pozrieť záznamy z programov z hlavných stanov.

programme.title: Simple Phrases
programme.desc: A series of animated episodes aimed at improving spoken English skills based on situational dialogues.

programme.title: Alfred & Wilfred
programme.desc: Go on an adventure with Alfred and Wilfred!

programme.title: Life Around
programme.desc: A series of animated films that will help you learn and memorize basic collocations and phrases for communicating on everyday topics and describing everyday situations.

programme.title: Irregular Verbs
programme.desc: A series of musical animated cartoons that will help you memorise irregular verb forms in a fun and easy way, thanks to specially written songs that encourage you to quickly learn the necessary words.

programme.title: Get a Call
programme.desc: This is a series of colourful animated cartoons where the characters have telephone conversations with sometimes very unexpected interlocutors; the project will help viewers to learn simple conversational skills, enjoy comical situations and enrich their English vocabulary.

programme.title: Coffee Chat
programme.desc: A series of animated films where you can learn a huge amount of thematic vocabulary with the characters having light conversations on various topics over a cup of coffee.

programme.title: Easy Talk
programme.desc: A series of animated films organized into several thematic blocks, for those who want to improve their spoken English and learn many useful expressions and vocabulary units.

programme.desc: A series of animated films that will help you learn and memorize basic collocations and phrases for communicating on everyday topics and describing everyday situations.

programme.title: Sing&Spell
programme.desc: An animated musical project that will help you effectively learn the spelling and sound of the simplest English words thanks to specially created funny riddle songs performed by cheerful characters.

programme.title: Get a Call
programme.desc: This is a series of colourful animated cartoons where the characters have telephone conversations with sometimes very unexpected interlocutors; the project will help viewers to learn simple conversational skills, enjoy comical situations and enrich their English vocabulary.

programme.title: Coffee Chat
programme.desc: A series of animated films where you can learn a huge amount of thematic vocabulary with the characters having light conversations on various topics over a cup of coffee.

programme.title: Easy Talk
programme.desc: A series of animated films organized into several thematic blocks, for those who want to improve their spoken English and learn many useful expressions and vocabulary units.

programme.title: Simple Phrases
programme.desc: A series of animated episodes aimed at improving spoken English skills based on situational dialogues.

programme.title: Divoká Latinská Amerika I (1)
programme.desc: (Zrození obřího keporkaka), Sledujte první měsíce života novorozeného keporkaka ve vodách u tichomořského pobřeží Kolumbie. Podívejte se, jak ho jeho matka ošetřuje během nemoci, podporuje jeho tělo, chrání ho při útoku a připravuje ho na epickou výpravu., (dokument)

programme.title: Divoká Latinská Amerika (3)
programme.desc: (Říše medvěda brýlatého), Seznamte se s jediným druhem medvěda v Jižní Americe. V odlehlé ekologické rezervaci Chaparri na severu Peru se stanete svědky hry, hledání potravy a partnerů plachého a charismatického medvěda brýlatého., (dokument)

programme.title: Mimořádné zvířecí smysly I (1)
programme.desc: (Superzrak), Zrak – tak si devadesát pět procent zvířat vykládá svět. Každý druh na Zemi je kapitolou ve fascinujícím příběhu zraku. V tomto díle sledujeme jeho cestu od rozmazaných začátků až po ohromující hexnokulární vidění., (dokument)

programme.title: Mimořádné zvířecí smysly (3)
programme.desc: (Neviditelný svět), Ponořte se do oslnivého světa mimo lidské vnímání, kde zvířata využívají své supersmysly k detekci světla, které nevidíme, zvuků, které neslyšíme, a ještě podivnějších sil, které nedokážeme rozpoznat., (dokument)

programme.title: Sněžní levharti s Danem O'Neillem (1)
programme.desc: Duch hor Vydejte se s Danem do drsné mongolské divočiny a pomozte mu najít Frajer, největšího irbise, jaký byl kdy zaznamenán. Sledujte, jak bojuje s nepřátelskou krajinou a nejistotou, a odhalte výzvy, kterým Frajer a ostatní irbisové čelí., (dokument)

programme.title: Sněžní levharti s Danem O'Neillem (2)
programme.desc: Jak chytit legendu Prozkoumejte území Frajera s Danem a jeho týmem, kteří mají podezření, že samice hrají větší roli, než si původně mysleli. Zpochybněte dosavadní výzkum chování irbisů, když Dan narazí na neobvyklou skupinu těchto velkých koček., (dokument)

programme.title: Jaguáří deník (1)
programme.desc: Schůzka s jaguáry Vydejte se s Lizzie a týmem Onçafari do Pantanalu pátrat po zmizelém dominantním jaguárovi. Sledujte boj mezi nadějnými mláďaty, jako je outsider Badalo, kteří chtějí usurpovat jeho moc a získat si Feru a ostatní tamní samice., (dokument)

programme.title: Vaticano
programme.desc: Oslávime odkaz pápeža Benedikta XVI. prostredníctvom slov tých, ktorí ho poznali najbližšie. Pozrieme sa na to, ako jeho rané spisy predvídali cestu, ktorou sa Cirkev vydá v ďalších rokoch. Stretneme sa s otcom Robertom Regolim, novým prezidentom Ratzingerovej nadácie, ktorá sa venuje podpore teologických poznatkov a výskumu. A navštívime prvú taliansku výstavu o nemeckom pápežovi, ktorá ukazuje verejný aj osobný rozmer Benedikta XVI., (spravodajstvo)

programme.title: Bielorusko – semienko medzi tŕním
programme.desc: Bielorusko, podobne ako všetky bývalé republiky Sovietskeho zväzu, celé desaťročia trpelo v područí brutálneho komunistického režimu. Cirkev tu bola kruto prenasledovaná, ale ľudia si uchovali svoju vieru aj vďaka tomu, že sa jej hodnoty prenášali z generácie na generáciu a tiež vďaka aktivite, viere, práci a húževnatosti podzemných kňazov a laikov, ktorí boli ochotní riskovať svoju slobodu a svoje životy., (dokument)

programme.title: Až na vrchol - Pier Giorgio Frassati
programme.desc: Pier Giorgio Frassati – mladý chlapec, univerzitný študent. Napriek tomu, že pochádzal zo zámožnej Turínskej rodiny, jeho jediným bohatstvom sa stala viera v Ježiša Krista. Jeho otec založil známy taliansky denník La Stampa. Aj mladý Pier Giorgio bol spoločensky aktívny, no napriek tomu sa jeho vášňou stala služba chudobným a apoštolát medzi mladými. O tom, do koľkých ľudských sŕdc vstúpil počas svojho krátkeho života, svedčili zástupy ľudí na jeho pohrebe., (dokument)

programme.title: Apokalypsa: Válka světů I (5)
programme.desc: Zeď Francie 2019 February 24, 1956. During the Soviet Communist Party's twentieth Congress, Khrushchev stuns everyone by denouncing Stalin's crimes. Without disavowing the ideology, the USSR's new leader seeks to distance himself from his predecessor and open up to the outside world. Mister K is full of surprises. He drinks Pepsi with Nixon and insists on spending a day at Disneyland when he visits America? But behind this clown-like character, the executioner of the Ukraine hasn't gone soft. In 1956, he didn't hesitate to crush the uprising in Budapest in bloodshed. Now, he is preparing a co-existence with newly elected President Kennedy that will be anything but peaceful. The Berlin Wall, the Cuban Missile Crisis, not to mention the assistance he gives Ho Chi Minh in preparing his new battle for reunification? The Vietnam War is about to begin. Kennedy attempts to retaliate; he sends military advisors to train the South Vietnamese army. And in Berlin, on June 26, 1963, he delivers...

programme.title: Apokalypsa: Válka světů I (6)
programme.desc: Propast Francie 2019 November 22, 1963. The entire world is in shock. President Kennedy has just been assassinated during a trip to Dallas. Even Khrushchev himself seems touched by the tragic news. In a surprising coincidence, South Vietnamese president Diem was assassinated twenty days earlier, in a coup organized by his generals? The players change, but the Vietnam war drags on. America's new President Johnson sinks his country further into the quagmire of war. Close to three million young Americans discover Hell - the jungle, the unbearable heat, and the Viet Cong, with its tunnels and traps. For the first time, television plays a special role in the war. In 1968, the American people discover the fiasco taking place in Vietnam through footage of the disastrous Tet Offensive aired on TV. Massacres, abuse and torture of American soldiers and the obvious defeat of their army. Soon, the United States has no choice but to recall its troops. This is victory for the Communist world? But...

programme.title: Letiště: Ztráty a nálezy I (4)
programme.desc: Diamanty, kostýmy a hotovost USA 2024 A lone diamond from grandma’s ring is lost at Pittsburgh’s airport by a young bride. Lost-and-found workers at Tampa International desperately try to find the owner of a fanny pack as it contains much-needed medication and $3,000 in cash. Travelers to a comic convention in Salt Lake City leave behind peculiar objects, including unique fan art acquired at the site., (dokument), USA, 2025

programme.title: Ostrov mimo zákon VII (7)
programme.desc: (Ghosts of Winter), Postačí jakákoli krev USA 2023 Oliver, Carl, and Matt fish with slinky pots for the first time and catch more than they bargained for. Curly builds a fish table and tries for halibut to break it in. Breanna, Terri, and Kris teach Veronica to haul logs out of the woods. And Sam repairs a wood stove that serves as the beating heart of his home., (dokument, dobrodružstvo), 2016

programme.title: Zabezpečení letiště: Brazílie - výběr V (1)
programme.desc: Nejrozsáhlejší zátahy USA 2021 The biggest cocaine busts from Airport Security Colombia and Peru. A man traveling to the DR, hides cocaine in children’s organizers. A stepmom and daughter conceal bricks of cocaine inside jackets. A mother with a child carries cocaine in food packages and kid’s clothes. The Anti-narcotics police find cocaine in a shipment of fresh herbs. A man going to Mexico with cocaine bricks in his carry-on. A man with liquid cocaine in beverage bottles., (dokument)

programme.title: Jak chytit pašeráka III (6)
programme.desc: (Je libo heroin?), USA 2021 San Diego HSI seizes a medley of narcotics hidden in a car, CBP processes ferry travelers in Puerto Rico, and officers at JFK discover looted artifacts., (seriál, dokument)

programme.title: Zákulisí letiště Melbourne I (4)
programme.desc: Zákaznický servis Austrálie 2024 Duty Manager Dan must deal with a check-in outage at the start of the busy school holidays. Airside Safety responds to a life-or-death medical emergency on an incoming flight. 68 racehorses valued at $300 million dollars arrive from Europe. Overnight, the airside lighting team carry out vital work while dodging planes., (dokument)

programme.title: Čingischán: Tajná kronika Mongolů I (4)
programme.desc: Nezastavitelné impérium Velká Británie 2024 When a neighboring empire attacks a Mongol caravan, Chinggis Khan unleashes a devastating campaign that annihilates the empire and solidifies Mongol dominance across the lands of Persia. As his health declines, he names his son Ogedei as his successor and leads one final campaign against the neighboring Tanguts before his death, leaving behind an empire that spans continents., (seriál, história, dokument), Veľká Británia, 2025

programme.title: Evropa z výšky - výběr II (4)
programme.desc: (Zima), USA 2023 This spectacular aerial journey reveals the wonders of winter in Europe. Zoom alongside giant ships smashing a path through the sea ice in Finland, soar above arctic huskies as they cross frozen lakes in Norway, and experience a bird’s eye view of the steepest funicular railway in the world in Switzerland. This is the best of Europe., (seriál, dokument)

programme.title: Ostrov mimo zákon VII (8)
programme.desc: (No Boundaries), Neustálý chaos USA 2023 Milestone achievements are only possible with steep challenges for the people of Port Protection. Matt helps Carl drag a massive barrel above his house. Mike Jiggy Nichols struggles to pull a salmon. Oliver and Breanna motor off to a new bay to find treasures and trout. And Squibb designs a new dock for his house - but can he build it?, (dokument, dobrodružstvo), 2016

programme.title: Jak se staví superauta I (10)
programme.desc: (Audi A8), Velká Británie 2016 In this episode of Supercar Megabuild, engineers Ralph and Ranen are being put into the deep freeze. Their mentor, car designer, Afzal Kahn has been contacted by a client and friend, asking him to produce a vehicle capable of surviving winter conditions, taking on difficult terrain…and crossing deep snow. To complete their mission, Ralph and Ranen begin by testing out the vehicle given to them by their boss - a comfortable, conservative executive saloon - the Audi A8. Putting it through its paces at an indoor ski centre, they show this vehicle has a long way to go before it can stand up to the clients brief. The subsequent adventure takes Ranen to the alps where he learns about the adaptations needed to take a car off piste and Ralph to the Scottish highlands, where he gets to grips with the treacherous terrain the Audi will need to take on. Before the car is revealed to the client in a spectacular finale, Ralph and Ranen modify the engine to withstand...

programme.title: Jak chytit pašeráka VII (4)
programme.desc: (Můj tlustý marihuanový úlovek), Můj tlustý marihuanový úlovek USA 2023 Homeland Security Investigations conducts an operation to crack-down on counterfeit goods leading to a large seizure in Kansas City and the raid of an apartment filled with thousands of sneakers in Cali, Colombia. In Newark, CBP receives intel about a passenger traveling to Greece with two suitcases filled with $200k worth of marijuana. CBP finds cocaine inside the bumper of a vehicle in Texas., (seriál, dokument)

programme.title: Vyšetřování leteckých neštěstí XXII (10)
programme.desc: Záhada nad Středozemním mořem Kanada 2021 En route from Paris to Cairo, EgyptAir Flight 804 spirals into the Mediterranean. While early evidence suggests a fire broke out on board, Egyptian authorities later claim an act of terror as the cause. The case is turned over to the Egyptian State Prosecutor for a criminal investigation. Six years later, an Italian journalist is leaked a report and a controversial new theory emerges., (dokument)

programme.title: Vyšetřování leteckých neštěstí: Zvláštní vydání V (10)
programme.desc: (Sabotage), Sabotáž Kanada 2021 Three flights are hijacked by acts of sabotage. When the cockpit of an Ethiopian airliner is stormed by hijackers, the captain manages an heroic yet deadly ocean landing. Investigators are torn between competing theories after an Italian passenger plane is blown out of the sky. And, Namibian investigators reach a chilling conclusion after piecing through the wreckage of LAM Mozambique Flight 470., (dokument, dráma)

programme.title: Továrna na jídlo: USA II (25)
programme.desc: Olivy, zmrzlinová lízátka a sušenkové chipsy USA 2015 On this episode of Food Factory USA: The incredible, epic story of the humble sliced black olive; this fruit and veggie ice pop is like a guilt-free, non-melting smoothie on a stick; and find out what it takes to produce millions of cookie chips - a distant relative of the potato chip - every week., (dokument), Kanada, USA, 2015

programme.title: Továrna na jídlo: USA II (26)
programme.desc: Mexické hranolky, karamely a absinth USA 2015 On this episode of Food Factory USA: Find out how humble whole potatoes are transformed into spicy, miniature Mexi-Fries; these chocolate-almond toffees have a connection to Hollywood royalty; and this California distillery has perfected the art of making the long-fabled alcoholic drink of absinthe., (dokument), Kanada, USA, 2015

programme.title: Aljaška: Noví osadníci VI (11)
programme.desc: (Vítejte v Moose Point), Vítejte v Moose Point USA 2023 The next generation uses their ingenuity to push through the fierce winter. Johnny Rolfe encounters Murphy’s law while fishing and must fix his snow machine in order to retrieve his bounty. Chevie Roach and his son Ryder help restore the community’s firetruck that hasn’t run in decades. Kaleb is determined to build a mobile fishing hut to keep his kids warm. Kyle and Katie Sarvela must gather essential resources for surviving the harsh Alaska coastline in winter., (seriál, dokument)

programme.title: Aljaška: Noví osadníci VI (12)
programme.desc: (Riziko pádu), Riziko pádu USA 2023 The next generation must forge through extreme and unknown territory to subsist in the Arctic. Mario struggles to find food in the White Mountains while the Rowland family battle treacherous ground to fish for dolly varden. The Sarvela family prepares for the season ahead by building a greenhouse while Chevie Roach breaks trail to a new location in hopes of expanding his hunting grounds., (seriál, dokument)

programme.title: Vteřiny před katastrofou VI (1)
programme.desc: Masová sebevražda v Jonestownu Norway, United Kingdom 2011 Friday 17th December 1978, deep in the Guyanese jungle, US congressman Leo Ryan and a team of journalists have just arrived at Jonestown - a religious community run by the enigmatic Reverend Jim Jones. They are there to investigate rumours of abuse and oppression., (dokument), 2012

programme.title: Letiště: Ztráty a nálezy I (5)
programme.desc: Drahé hodinky a ještě dražší perly USA 2024 Airport employees reunite travelers with their lost items, including a pair of ornate Shriners fezzes, a bride’s pearl necklace, and a $12,000 Jaeger watch. In New Orleans, a mom retrieves the wallet she left on the plane after buying snacks for her kids, and in Alabama shoppers from around the country line up for hours to enter Unclaimed Baggage’s giant annual sale of lost ski equipment., (dokument), USA, 2025

programme.title: Vyšetřování leteckých neštěstí XXI (10)
programme.desc: Ztráta legendy Kanada 2021 When basketball legend Kobe Bryant is killed in a helicopter crash in Los Angeles, investigators look for clues amid a global outpouring of grief., (dokument)

programme.title: Jak chytit pašeráka III (6)
programme.desc: (Koks na vodě), USA 2021 CBP officers at PortMiami find nine kilograms of cocaine worth $460,000 magnetically attached to a ship, before unboxing a load of styrofoam found to conceal 215 kilograms of cocaine worth $11 million. In El Paso, HSI agents pursue an SUV loaded with eight kilograms of cocaine in the hopes of busting a cartel handoff. At JFK, officers screen flights for individuals attempting to bring luxury goods into the US without paying import duty taxes., (seriál, dokument)

programme.title: Chris Hemsworth: Nezapomenutelná cesta
programme.desc: USA 2024 In his most personal documentary yet, Chris turns the camera on his own family after his dad’s recent Alzheimer’s diagnosis. They embark on a road trip into their past, exploring the science of social connection and how it can support memory function. They revisit meaningful places and faces, capturing it all as a home movie, and reviving treasured recollections., (dokument), USA, 2025

programme.title: Billy & Molly: Příběh vydří lásky
programme.desc: Velká Británie 2023 When a wild otter in desperate need of help washes up on his jetty in the remote Scottish Islands of Shetland, Billy, his wife Susan, and their devoted sheep dog Jade find themselves with a unique new member of their family. Billy & Molly is a heart-warming documentary about the ability of love to reawaken us to the beauty of nature., (dokument)

programme.title: Za hranicí nemožného I (10)
programme.desc: (Free Solo cesta), USA 2021 Alex Honnold became the world’s most famous alpinist when he climbed Yosemite’s granite wall without a rope. But how did Alex prepare to do the impossible? He and his friend Tommy Caldwell went to Morocco and pushed their limits on equally huge walls, culminating with Alex’s ropeless climb up the hardest route. This is Alex’s tireless, grinding process to transform a dream into reality., (seriál, dokument)

programme.title: UFO: Zkoumání fenoménu II (3)
programme.desc: (Scientists on the Cutting Edge), Vědci a špičkový pokrok USA 2024 Scientists across academia take matters into their own hands, employing a variety of cutting-edge tools to study UFO phenomena. Using AI, precise radar systems, advances in physics and analyses of historical images, they hope to collect data that reveals the source of these mysterious sightings., (dokument), USA, 2025

programme.title: UFO: Zkoumání fenoménu II (6)
programme.desc: (Citizen Scientists Tackle the Phenomenon), Lidoví vědci zkoumají UFO USA 2024 No longer waiting for the government to reveal everything they know about UFOs, citizen scientists and privately funded organizations are making advances in data collection. In the air and under the seas, exploration continues to push for answers to the ultimate question: Are we alone?, (dokument), USA, 2025

programme.title: Holokaust v plné hrůze
programme.desc: Velká Británie 2023 We think we know the full scale of the Holocaust. We don’t. Before the death camps millions were murdered in a holocaust of bullets that swept across eastern Europe. No-one knows how many were killed and the dead have never been found. Now, teams of investigators are using forensic analysis and cutting-edge technology to establish the true extent of the Holocaust., (dokument)

programme.title: Druhá světová válka: Peklo v hlubinách II (6)
programme.desc: (Krize studené války), Kanada 2018 October 1962. A secret mission sends Four Soviet Project submarines carrying nuclear torpedoes, racing toward Cuba. While they are enroute the U.S. implements a Quarantine Line around the island. When Soviet submarine, B-59, is discovered practice depth charges are dropped; nearly inciting a nuclear war., (seriál, história, dokument), Kanada, 2016

programme.title: Letiště: Ztráty a nálezy I (5)
programme.desc: Drahé hodinky a ještě dražší perly USA 2024 Airport employees reunite travelers with their lost items, including a pair of ornate Shriners fezzes, a bride’s pearl necklace, and a $12,000 Jaeger watch. programme.title: Zabezpečení letiště: Brazílie - výběr V (2)
programme.desc: Překvapení a polapení pašeráci USA 2021 Police at Brazil’s Săo Paolo International Airport are at the front lines against drug trafficking. Agents arrest a man with cocaine taped to his legs. A man is seized with cocaine in Pope portraits. A woman inserted drugs and carries more in her bra. A lively elder faints when her bleach powder tested positive for cocaine. A woman petrified by police – and her surprising load., (dokument)

programme.title: Jak chytit pašeráka III (6)
programme.desc: (Koks na vodě), USA 2021 CBP officers at PortMiami find nine kilograms of cocaine worth $460,000 magnetically attached to a ship, before unboxing a load of styrofoam found to conceal 215 kilograms of cocaine worth $11 million. In El Paso, HSI agents pursue an SUV loaded with eight kilograms of cocaine in the hopes of busting a cartel handoff. programme.title: Zákulisí letiště Melbourne I (5)
programme.desc: Nová generace Austrálie 2024 On his first day, Australian Border Force recruit Nelson makes a find. A daring pushback trial ten years in the making involving multiple aircraft is under threat. Baggage manager Brodie faces the challenge of handling 2,000 bags during a system upgrade. A father and son pilot duo tackle a new flight simulator., (dokument)

programme.title: Čingischán: Tajná kronika Mongolů I (5)
programme.desc: (Vláda Ogodeje), Vláda Ogodeje Velká Británie 2024 After Chinggis Khan’s secret burial, his son Ogedei is proclaimed ruler of the Mongol Empire. He brings a very different leadership style as he conquers Armenia, Georgia and the Jin Empire. He orders the building of the grand capital of Karakorum and sets the stage for a brutal campaign against Kievan Rus, led by his nephew Batu and the veteran general Subudai., (seriál, história, dokument)

programme.title: Amsterdam Centraal: Nádraží, které nespí I (2)
programme.desc: Grand Prix Nizozemska Nizozemsko 2024 During the Dutch F1 Grand Prix, Amsterdam Central will have to deal with 60,000 racing fanatics. They will depart throughout the morning, but will all come back at the same time. For Traffic Control and the station employees, it is all hands-on deck to manage the enormous flow of people. While people are trying to prevent passenger congestion, the shops are waiting for their delayed goods., (dokument)

programme.title: Cesta bez hranic I (2)
programme.desc: Vietnam Velká Británie 2025 Hannah Fry travels to Vietnam, a land of staggering natural beauty, ancient traditions and some of the fastest growing skylines on earth. Over 1,600 km from the vibrant South to the historic North, she uncovers the story of the country’s remarkable post-war transformation. She immerses herself in the moped chaos in Ho Chi Minh City, helps with a muddy prawn harvest in the Mekong Delta and takes a restorative spa bath in the misty hilltops of Sapa. She ushers in the New Year with a local family celebrating the Tet festival and learns how a beloved dish, pho, tells a story of identity. In each place she visits, she meets characters whose lives have been shaped by both war and renewal. What emerges is a nation embracing change, where striking contrasts are balanced by a spirit of cooperation and strong family bonds., (šport)

programme.title: Poslední rybí titáni III (1)
programme.desc: (Barracuda Brawl), Boj s barakudou USA 2023 Cyril and his team get stranded ashore, until a village chief comes to the rescue with a pirogue, an old, open, leaky boat the team hopes can survive the four-hour open ocean voyage to the turbulent waters of the Bijagos Archipelago. Cyrils quest for a giant barracuda is quickly answered by a fish so brutally explosive, it knocks him off his feet., (dokument, dobrodružstvo), 2024

programme.title: Poslední rybí titáni III (2)
programme.desc: (Wreck Bounty), Žraločí stín USA 2023 A territorial bull shark interrupts Cyril’s search for a giant barracuda, herding the team into dangerously shallow waters crowded with ferocious crocodiles and massive hippos. When the great bull shark charges out of the shadows, Cyril has no choice but to stand and face the beast., (dokument, dobrodružstvo), 2024

programme.title: Nejúžasnější destinace světa: Kuej-čou II (1)
programme.desc: Epizoda 1 Singapur 2025 Guizhou, China, recognized twice in Nat Geo’s Best of the World travel list, is once again the focus of exploration in Best of the World’s Destinations Season 2. Following the success of Season 1, renowned photographer and explorer Chris Burkard leads a fresh and immersive journey across the province. Through his unique perspective, Chris reveals Guizhou’s stunning landscapes, rich culture, and vibrant communities. By blending breathtaking scenery, adventure, local stories, and intimate moments, this 44-minute documentary invites viewers to uncover Guizhou’s extraordinary spirit and timeless beauty., (dokument)

programme.title: Stavíme Evropu I (6)
programme.desc: Polsko Velká Británie 2024 Venture into the heart of Poland’s most awe-inspiring engineering marvels. Watch as a super port rises from the depths of the sea, and uncover the secrets behind the tallest building in the European Union. Descend into the shadows beneath Wieliczka, where a sprawling city-sized mine lies hidden, then witness the towering legacy of the world’s tallest wooden structure., (dokument)

programme.title: Dokonalý vůz II (2)
programme.desc: (McLaren Artura), Velká Británie 2022 McLaren their first clean sheet design since 2011. To forge a more environmentally friendly era for the marque, the team creates their first production hybrid., (dokument)

programme.title: Za hranicí nemožného I (7)
programme.desc: (Návrat do života), Návrat do života USA 2021 Legendary climber Conrad Anker and his mentee David Lama want to be the first to summit Lunag Ri, the tallest unclimbed peak in the Himalayas. As they struggle on the side of the mountain, at an altitude of 20,000 feet and glacial temperatures, Conrad grasps for air and suddenly feels a pain in his chest. He realizes he is having a heart attack in one of the most inhospitable places on Earth., (seriál, dokument)

programme.title: Za hranicí nemožného I (8)
programme.desc: (Nesmíš spadnout), USA 2021 Big mountain skier Angel Collinson boasts the most important achievements in the sport, from first place trophies to best lines ridden. Seeking to cross new limits, she says yes to riding some of the steepest spines in Alaska for a new film. But when she loses control of her skis in the middle of a high-speed descent, Angel starts falling down a 1000-ft slope—and only stops at the bottom., (seriál, dokument)

programme.title: Záchrana na zledovatělé silnici IX (1)
programme.desc: (Divoká jízda), Norsko 2023 Thords skills are put to the test when the tricky rescue of an excavator forces him to find extraordinary solutions. But hes in double trouble when rookie Terjes reckless driving ends in disaster. In the north, Jo Roger and Ole Henrik try to rescue a truck that crashed in a ditch, 20 metres from the road edge. They bring two big tow trucks, but have come under-gunned, and must find more power., (dokument)

programme.title: Záchrana na zledovatělé silnici IX (3)
programme.desc: (Srážka v koloně), Norsko 2023 As trucks speed past to get up a hill, Thord puts his life in danger to rescue one truck that skidded to a stop on the ice. Thord must save it, before the forty-tonner slides back into oncoming traffic. In the north, rookie Raido battles icy conditions to recover a jackknifed fish truck. But the road is so treacherous that even standing up is a struggle, making the rescue appear impossible., (dokument)

programme.title: Záchrana na zledovatělé silnici IX (8)
programme.desc: (Trable na druhou), Norsko 2023 When Thord and Bjoern rescue a truck that threatens to tip, Thord crawls beneath the trailer during the pull, putting his life in Bjoerns hands. In the north, a snow plough slides off the road on sheet ice. Jo Roger heads out to the rescue, but finds himself in double trouble when a second truck crashes in the same spot and lands right on top of the snow plough., (dokument)

programme.title: Megastavby: Ledoborec
programme.desc: Francie 2021 Through immersive CGI animations, exclusive backstage access across Europe, and extreme weather exploration scenes, Megastructure: Icebreaker will take you to the heart of an incredible challenge: the building of the most innovative icebreaker in the world, both an polar exploration ship and an itinerant scientific laboratory., (dokument), USA, 2004

programme.title: Zákulisí letiště Melbourne I (8)
programme.desc: Úplněk Austrálie 2024 Baggage manager Brodie races against the clock to reunite a passenger with their lost luggage. An airport visitor faces an unexpected mishap. In the hangar, engineers tackle a complex engineering challenge. As a full moon rises, the night shift contends with problem passengers. Adding to the pressure, a construction crew's staircase installation risks blocking the airport's sole access road., (dokument)

programme.title: Oceán s Davidem Attenboroughem
programme.desc: Velká Británie 2024 David Attenborough draws on a lifetime of experience to reveal Earth’s most spectacular underwater habitats, showing that we’re in the greatest age of Ocean discovery and highlighting its vital importance. While exposing the Ocean's biggest challenges, Attenborough’s message is one of hope: the opportunity for marine life recovery on an unprecedented scale is within reach., (zábava, dokument), Veľká Británia, 2025

programme.title: Od pólu k pólu s Willem Smithem I (2)
programme.desc: (Smrtící tvorové Amazonie), Smrtící tvorové Amazonie USA 2022 Will, A MAN SCARED OF SPIDERS HIS WHOLE LIFE, ventures deep into the Ecuadorian Amazon in search of deadly creatures. Joined by professor Bryan Fry and local mountaineer Carla Perez, they abseil 200 feet into a cave network known as the "womb of the Earth,” to discover the giant tarantula. Using cutting-edge techniques, they extract its venom, which could hold the key to saving millions of lives., (dokument)

programme.title: Gladiátoři: Bojovníci starověkého světa I (1)
programme.desc: (Spartakus: Vzestup gladiátora), Spartakus: Vzestup gladiátora Velká Británie 2025 75 BCE, Spartacus, a soldier enslaved by Rome and forced into gladiatorial combat leads fellow gladiators in a daring escape. Disaffected slaves join him, sparking a massive rebellion that defeats Roman legions. His story shows how closely linked gladiators were to the politics of the Roman Republic. Though he’s ultimately defeated, his legacy lives on as a symbol of freedom., (seriál, história, dokument)

programme.title: Gladiátoři: Bojovníci starověkého světa I (2)
programme.desc: (Neronův oblíbený gladiátor), Neronův oblíbený gladiátor Velká Británie 2025 Spiculus, Nero’s favourite gladiator, becomes a superstar in Rome’s brutal arenas. Rewarded with wealth and privilege, he fights for glory as Nero uses lavish games to display his power. After the Fire of 64 CE, Nero’s spectacles grow grander. When his reign finally collapses, Nero calls for Spiculus to kill him - but dies by his own hand. Spiculus’s fate remains a mystery, his legend enduring., (seriál, história, dokument)

programme.title: Záchranáři z Yukonu I (1)
programme.desc: Plameny a mráz Kanada 2024 Frigid temperatures wreak havoc on Dawson City. A midnight call to a truck fire in -30°C weather finds the crew fighting to extinguish the flames and rescue the driver. Later, the cold snap bursts pipes across town, and Chief Mike’s team must put their fears aside as they respond to a toxic gas leak. Meanwhile, Yukon communities near the Klondike Highway are cut off from supplies after an avalanche shuts down the main throughway. Avalanche technician Colin takes to the air to break up the snowpack, but when his bombs bounce off the dense, frozen snow, he’s forced to come up with a new plan to open up the road., (dokument)

programme.title: Puma versus vlk
programme.desc: USA 2013 Cougar expert Boone Smith tracks deep into Montana's Bitterroot Mountains in search of evidence detailing the competition between the two biggest predators roaming this stunning winter landscape. His goal: pinpoint the places where cougar-wolf conflicts most often occur by gathering clues about each creatures hunting, feeding and fighting behaviors., (dokument)

programme.title: Šimpanzí škola
programme.desc: Velká Británie 2017 In Sierra Leone chimps are struggling. After civil war and Ebola, they are not a priority. The race is on to bring them back from the brink. Tacugama Chimp Sanctuary is doing that. For the chimps the mission is simple; find your personality, find your place in a troop, and find a way to live. This is an intimate, harrowing and heart-warming story told through the evolving and enchanting lives of individual chimp characters fighting to survive., (dokument)

programme.title: Planeta primátů
programme.desc: USA 2025 From tropical treetops to snowy peaks, Primate Planet takes you on a whirlwind tour of the wild world of primates, uncovering their unique behaviors, strong family bonds, and surprising personalities., (dokument)

programme.title: Záhadná gorila
programme.desc: USA 2009 In the forest of northern Congo, more than 100,000 western lowland gorillas have largely managed to avoid human contact. What they've been hiding is astounding. From tool use to intricate social behavior, these gorillas lead complex lives. Explorer and primatologist, Mireya Mayor, journeys deep into the unforgiving jungle to uncover the secrets of these mysterious giants., (dokument)

programme.title: Jaguár: Ikona guyanské džungle
programme.desc: Německo 2024 A young jaguar is about to embark on the most important mission of his life, : to strike out and find a kingdom of his own. His journey will take him through varied habitats, each with its own cast of animals. Only if he can prove his worth will the jaguar be able to claim his throne in one of the last truly wild paradises on the planet., (dokument)

programme.title: Šimpanzí škola
programme.desc: Velká Británie 2017 In Sierra Leone chimps are struggling. After civil war and Ebola, they are not a priority. The race is on to bring them back from the brink. Tacugama Chimp Sanctuary is doing that. For the chimps the mission is simple; find your personality, find your place in a troop, and find a way to live. This is an intimate, harrowing and heart-warming story told through the evolving and enchanting lives of individual chimp characters fighting to survive., (dokument)

programme.title: Planeta primátů
programme.desc: USA 2025 From tropical treetops to snowy peaks, Primate Planet takes you on a whirlwind tour of the wild world of primates, uncovering their unique behaviors, strong family bonds, and surprising personalities., (dokument)

programme.title: Záhadná gorila

From tool use to intricate social behavior, these gorillas lead complex lives. Explorer and primatologist, Mireya Mayor, journeys deep into the unforgiving jungle to uncover the secrets of these mysterious giants., (dokument)

programme.title: Neobyčejná Austrálie I (1)
programme.desc: Nezkrocené lesy Velká Británie 2024 From lush ancient rainforests to wet grassland and dry eucalyptus forest, Australias diverse habitats are home to an array of weird and wonderful creatures found nowhere else on the planet. From the bizarre anatomy of the platypus to the savage screams of Tasmanian devils, the creatures of Australia rely on extraordinary adaptations to survive in continents vast and diverse habitats., (dokument)

programme.title: Skvělá farma doktora Pola I (1)
programme.desc: Založení farmy USA 2022 The long-awaited spinoff of the legendary The Incredible Dr. Pol franchise has finally hatched! Spearheaded by Dr. Pol and his son Charles, the Pol familys three generations are all joining forces to grow their animal loving empire and take on an ambitious new project: transforming 350-acres of undeveloped land into a fully functional family farm!, (dokument)

programme.title: Skvělá farma doktora Pola I (2)
programme.desc: Plány se senem USA 2022 After getting the tractor stuck in mud, Charles and Ben need a quick solution to plant hayseed in their field to provide food for their incoming animals. The Pol family must quickly figure out why their field is so wet even though it hasnt rained in days. Meanwhile, Dr. Pol helps Charles and Beth set up their first beehive colonies on the new farm., (dokument)

programme.title: Austrálie, země prastarých tvorů
programme.desc: Velká Británie 2023 Australias Land of the Ancients explores the unique and ancient landscape of northeastern Australia, the most biodiverse region on the continent. From Crocodiles lying in wait for fish and hunting feral pigs to caring marsupial mothers of the far north, the film highlights some of the incredible species as they struggle to survive in their harsh environment amid a changing landscape., (dokument)

programme.title: Zvířecí klub rváčů IV (3)
programme.desc: (Králokati), Velká Británie 2016 In an action packed episode of Animal Fight Club we reveal what happens when the Animal Kingdom's most vicious species fight tooth and claw in the deadliest of conflicts. With exclusive user generated content and footage from top wildlife filmmakers, this episode sheds new light on the fiercest fights Mother Nature has to offer, proving that it's not always the animal you expect that ends up coming out on top …, (seriál, dokument)

programme.title: Neobyčejná Austrálie I (1)
programme.desc: Nezkrocené lesy Velká Británie 2024 From lush ancient rainforests to wet grassland and dry eucalyptus forest, Australias diverse habitats are home to an array of weird and wonderful creatures found nowhere else on the planet. From the bizarre anatomy of the platypus to the savage screams of Tasmanian devils, the creatures of Australia rely on extraordinary adaptations to survive in continents vast and diverse habitats., (dokument)

programme.title: Austrálie, země prastarých tvorů
programme.desc: Velká Británie 2023 Australias Land of the Ancients explores the unique and ancient landscape of northeastern Australia, the most biodiverse region on the continent. From Crocodiles lying in wait for fish and hunting feral pigs to caring marsupial mothers of the far north, the film highlights some of the incredible species as they struggle to survive in their harsh environment amid a changing landscape., (dokument)

programme.title: Zvířecí klub rváčů IV (3)
programme.desc: (Králokati), Velká Británie 2016 In an action packed episode of Animal Fight Club we reveal what happens when the Animal Kingdom's most vicious species fight tooth and claw in the deadliest of conflicts. With exclusive user generated content and footage from top wildlife filmmakers, this episode sheds new light on the fiercest fights Mother Nature has to offer, proving that it's not always the animal you expect that ends up coming out on top …, (seriál, dokument)

programme.title: Zvířecí klub rváčů IV (2)
programme.desc: (Nebezpečná africká zvířata), Velká Británie 2016 The plains of Africa are home to nature's most fearsome predators - Cheetahs, Lions, Hyenas. But the battle for survival is never one sided, even the prey animals are formidable. We see a mother cheetah come face to face with the heavy weaponry of a Grants Gazelle, and unpack what happens when three male lions make the mistake of their lives, and try to take down a pugnacious Rhino., (seriál, dokument)

programme.title: Zvířecí klub rváčů IV (5)
programme.desc: (Boj o moc), Velká Británie 2016 Animal Fight Club: Power Struggles reveals how the even the most epic battles can be won or lost in a split second. In the world of wild animal fights, nothing is ever certain. Whether an animal is fighting for food, shelter or for survival itself, there are no guarantees. Sometimes even strength of numbers is not enough. In this episode we see a female leopard fight a bigger male for her lunch and her life, discover the complex competition amongst the world's largest Great Apes and see how a Nile Monitor Lizard can turn its tail into a show stopping weapon., (seriál, dokument)

programme.title: Neobyčejná Austrálie I (1)
programme.desc: Nezkrocené lesy Velká Británie 2024 From lush ancient rainforests to wet grassland and dry eucalyptus forest, Australias diverse habitats are home to an array of weird and wonderful creatures found nowhere else on the planet. From the bizarre anatomy of the platypus to the savage screams of Tasmanian devils, the creatures of Australia rely on extraordinary adaptations to survive in continents vast and diverse habitats., (dokument)

programme.title: Neobyčejná Austrálie I (2)
programme.desc: Divoká pobřeží Velká Británie 2024 Australias coastline is a true natural wonder, encompassing a diverse range of bountiful habitats. Coastal seas and lands are realms of epic migrations, mesmerising mating rituals and high stakes battles between predator and prey., (dokument)

programme.title: Divoké lesy Austrálie
programme.desc: JAR 2025 "Australia's Wild Woodlands” explores the rich biodiversity and resilience of Australia's eucalyptus forests, home to the world’s largest variety of parrots and iconic species like the platypus. These woodlands span vast regions and support diverse wildlife, from red kangaroos to freshwater crocodiles. The film showcases the rare behaviors of marsupials and birds, highlighting threats from climate change and land clearing. Ancient ecosystems remain largely unchanged since the dinosaurs, but species like the Gouldian finch face uncertain futures. Through intimate storytelling, the documentary reveals the ecological importance and fragility of these vibrant landscapes., (dokument)

programme.title: Stromoví klokani: Duchové lesa
programme.desc: JAR 2021 One of Australia's most extraordinary creatures, Lumholtz tree kangaroos are the ghosts of the north Queensland forests. Trekking through the wilderness of the Atherton Tableland, we go inside the remarkable lives of these elusive tree-climbing specialists., (dokument)

programme.title: Austrálie, země prastarých tvorů
programme.desc: Velká Británie 2023 Australias Land of the Ancients explores the unique and ancient landscape of northeastern Australia, the most biodiverse region on the continent. From Crocodiles lying in wait for fish and hunting feral pigs to caring marsupial mothers of the far north, the film highlights some of the incredible species as they struggle to survive in their harsh environment amid a changing landscape., (dokument)

programme.title: Skvělý dr. Pol XXI (8)
programme.desc: (Zima jako v psírně!), USA 2022 Get ready to rumble! From brawling birds to hurting hooves, the vets swing into action mending paws, jaws, even a down on his luck duck. Doc wages an epic battle to save a cow struggling to give birth, Dr. Lisa treats a Husky hit by a truck, and Dr. Nicole examines a pack of puppies with a plethora of problems. The Pols welcome their newest fur baby, Christy, a rambunctious Bengal kitten., (seriál, dokument)

programme.title: Skvělý dr. Pol XXI (9)
programme.desc: (P(o)lno štěňat), USA 2022 Limps, lumps and camel thumps! From domesticated to the exotics, Dr. Pol and his team witness a gamut of injuries in the harsh winter weather. Emotions run high when Dr. Nicole treats her own beloved beagle. Dr. Pol finds something’s a foot with a rowdy camel and it’s all hands-on-deck for an emergency labor resulting in litter of 11 puppies., (seriál, dokument)

programme.title: Nezkrocené Filipíny I (1)
programme.desc: Čarovné ostrovy USA 2017 We start on the tiny island of Batan, meeting a unique viper and a ubiquitous but also giant, land crab. Luzon is the main island of the Philippines. We drop in to Mindoro to see the most endangered large mammal in the Philippines, the tamaraw., (dokument)

programme.title: Nezkrocené Filipíny I (2)
programme.desc: Divoký ráj USA 2017 Moving from turtles of the Palawan coast to the unique National Marine Park at Tubbataha, to meet giants, whale sharks and manta rays. We also see how people can mediate between people and wildlife as we join a snake hunting team catching and translocating a deadly Samar cobra., (dokument)

programme.title: Klenoty evropské divočiny I (1)
programme.desc: Jeden kontinent, pět světů Německo 2025 With leopards in its mountains, blue whales off its coasts, and foxes roaming its city centres, Europe is a continent full of wild surprises. From the frozen glaciers of Iceland to the lush islands of the Azores, and from the rugged peaks of the Caucasus to the metropolis of London, the first episode in this stunning series highlights Europe’s astonishing diversity, all shot with breath-taking brio and the latest technology to reveal the continent and its animals in all its breath-taking glory., (dokument)

programme.title: Skvělá farma doktora Pola I (3)
programme.desc: Senoseč USA 2022 It’s summer in Michigan, which means time to bale some hay! It’s a grueling process, but Dr. Pol, Charles, and Ben manage to mow their hayfield, which is the first step in baling. But a surprise rainstorm could ruin this year’s hay haul. They hope for sun, so their crop doesn’t spoil before they can bale. Meanwhile, the Pol’s bring in their next animal to the farm – an emu!, (dokument)

programme.title: Skvělá farma doktora Pola I (4)
programme.desc: To snad bééé! USA 2022 It's the county fair season! The Pol’s plan to get at least two cows and six sheep at the auction, but they have a lot to do before that can happen. First up, they must install a new perimeter fence. Charles and Ben think they are off to a good start, but when Dr. Pol points out how sneaky sheep can be, their workload doubles. Meanwhile, Beth is hoping for a goat at the small animal auction., (dokument)

programme.title: Tajemství tučňáků I (1)
programme.desc: (Císařské srdce), Velká Británie 2023 The emperors are the largest and strongest of all penguins, living in the coldest, most extreme place on Earth. National Geographic Explorer Bertie Gregory embeds with an Antarctic colony and encounters social skills never filmed before. As the planet rapidly warms, he discovers bonds forged from birth between family, friends and strangers are the difference between life and death., (seriál, dobrodružstvo, dokument)

programme.title: Nejdivnější zvířata Jižní Ameriky I (2)
programme.desc: Země obrů a zakrslíků Nový Zeland 2020 South America is a land of extremes. Many hundred thousand square miles of forests, grasslands and mountains. Existing here is a daunting proposition, and some well-known animals have adapted by growing large or very small, each strategy maximizing their chance of survival., (dokument)

programme.title: Klenoty evropské divočiny I (1)
programme.desc: Jeden kontinent, pět světů Německo 2025 With leopards in its mountains, blue whales off its coasts, and foxes roaming its city centres, Europe is a continent full of wild surprises. From the frozen glaciers of Iceland to the lush islands of the Azores, and from the rugged peaks of the Caucasus to the metropolis of London, the first episode in this stunning series highlights Europe’s astonishing diversity, all shot with breath-taking brio and the latest technology to reveal the continent and its animals in all its breath-taking glory., (dokument)

programme.title: Tajemství tučňáků I (1)
programme.desc: (Císařské srdce), Velká Británie 2023 The emperors are the largest and strongest of all penguins, living in the coldest, most extreme place on Earth. National Geographic Explorer Bertie Gregory embeds with an Antarctic colony and encounters social skills never filmed before. As the planet rapidly warms, he discovers bonds forged from birth between family, friends and strangers are the difference between life and death., (seriál, dobrodružstvo, dokument)

programme.title: Nejdivnější zvířata Jižní Ameriky I (2)
programme.desc: Země obrů a zakrslíků Nový Zeland 2020 South America is a land of extremes. Many hundred thousand square miles of forests, grasslands and mountains. Existing here is a daunting proposition, and some well-known animals have adapted by growing large or very small, each strategy maximizing their chance of survival., (dokument)

programme.title: Podivuhodná příroda I (1)
programme.desc: Pozřen zaživa JAR 2025 Evolution has created countless wondrous creatures that are colorful, amazing and strange. The darker side of nature reveals some of the most bizarre forms natural selection has produced. Gaze into the realm of gulpers: animals who waste no time eating their prey — often swallowing it whole. Something deadly lies silent in the leaf litter of West Africa. The Gaboon viper is loaded with the largest fangs and fastest strike of any snake. Further south, the solifuge, or sun spider, darts through the desert, seeking an unlucky bug to mince with its massive mandibles. Strange mouths are also in the ocean. The moray eel is a bizarre fish, but its most characteristic charm is hiding down its dark throat. These and more lie in store., (dokument)

programme.title: Skvělý dr. Pol XX (22)
programme.desc: (Z pekla štěstí), USA 2022 Dr. Pol hits the road to treat Louella, a huge sow that’s too ill to feed her 15 piglets. Dr. Lisa assesses a newborn colt’s wobbly gait and stitches up a mare’s leg gash. Then, Dr. Brenda examines a gelding showing signs of a neurological disease. The PVS docs also treat Great Pyrenees pups, fluffy shelter kittens, and both a German shepherd pup and 167-lb. Rottweiler with leg injuries., (seriál, dokument)

programme.title: Skvělý dr. Pol XXI (2)
programme.desc: (Po(l)hlídám vás!), USA 2022 The docs of PVS are on the case! With an unruly cow, a colt’s double hernia, and a wrinkly puppy’s first visit on the books, it’s a busy week ahead. While Animal Control shadows Dr. Pol around town, Dr. Nicole treats a German Shepherd that’s so sick she can barely walk, and Dr. Lisa stitches up a cat’s creepy leg wound., (seriál, dokument)

programme.title: Skvělý dr. Pol XXI (4)
programme.desc: (Po(l)hmožděné tlapky), USA 2022 From a harrowing farrowing to an emergency kidding, the vets pull off miracles! There’s no pause in paws as Dr. Brenda and Dr. Lisa treat a variety of foot injuries, including a Sheltie with broken toes. Dr. Pol examines a massive mastiff with tummy trouble and an injured rabbit. The Pol family add a pregnant Friesian mare to the herd and Dr. Nicole has her hands full with a rooster and a cat., (seriál, dokument)

programme.title: Záchrana aljašských zvířat - výběr VII (1)
programme.desc: Útrapy dospívání USA 2025 Alaska’s conservation heroes are helping orphaned animals with their growing pains. An abandoned young harbor seal takes an epic journey across Alaska to undergo rehabilitation at the Alaska SeaLife Center. The team at the Alaska Wildlife Conservation Center takes on the role of mom for a pair of orphaned moose calves, hoping they survive the crucial first months. They also respond to a call about an unusual squirrelly rescue. And at the Alaska Raptor Center, a trio of tiny, orphaned screech owlets must bulk up before they can be released., (dokument, príroda), USA, 2020

programme.title: Divoká Mississippi I (1)
programme.desc: (Velký mráz), USA 2011 This blue-chip natural history special is the first of three hours that take us on a wild journey down the Mississippi to reveal a river you only think you know. Beginning in the fall at the very head of the river, we follow its path to find hungry wolves, freezing bobcats, warring bald eagles, hapless porcupines, and phantom owls that hunt what they can't see., (seriál, dokument), USA, 2012

programme.title: Tajemství tučňáků I (1)
programme.desc: (Císařské srdce), Velká Británie 2023 The emperors are the largest and strongest of all penguins, living in the coldest, most extreme place on Earth. National Geographic Explorer Bertie Gregory embeds with an Antarctic colony and encounters social skills never filmed before. As the planet rapidly warms, he discovers bonds forged from birth between family, friends and strangers are the difference between life and death., (seriál, dobrodružstvo, dokument)

programme.title: Tajemství tučňáků I (2)
programme.desc: (Rebelové z podstaty), Velká Británie 2023 It takes a special type of courageous penguin to survive the fierce Southern Ocean, but forty million crowd its isolated, rocky outposts. They are the most successful penguins on Earth. National Geographic Explorer Bertie Gregory follows the rockhoppers, gentoos and macaronis to discover a world of risk-takers, rebels, and unconventional parents., (seriál, dobrodružstvo, dokument)

programme.title: Tajemství tučňáků I (3)
programme.desc: (Nejchytřejší přežije), Nejchytřejší přežije Velká Británie 2023 Millions of years ago, a group of penguins left the ice in search of more. Riding powerful currents, the tiny adventurers arrived in strange new lands, reshaping traditions for deserts, tropics … and even among humans. They were tested to the extreme, becoming perhaps the smartest of them all. National Geographic Explorer Bertie Gregory discovers penguin problem solving, ‘talking’, and their enduring search for new worlds., (seriál, dobrodružstvo, dokument)

programme.title: Příšerky v péči jižanských veterinářů II (1)
programme.desc: Mámy a mláďata USA 2022 Baby chicks keep Drs. Hodges and Ferguson on their toes! A pregnant husky and a pregnant Doberman pinscher come in, both needing emergency C-sections. A zoo needs help determining the sexes of some beavers under their care. A puppy named Titan is diagnosed with parvo and desperately needs a blood transfusion - Dr. Hodges' dog Bane comes to the rescue! A kitten comes in after being accidentally stepped on by its owner., (dokument)

programme.title: Příšerky v péči jižanských veterinářů II (2)
programme.desc: Pomoc na cestě USA 2022 House Calls (2/7@Critter Fixers: Country Vets: Compilation Season 2) - Global Synopsis, (dokument)

programme.title: Příšerky v péči jižanských veterinářů: Psi - výběr VI (1)
programme.desc: Rozštěkej to! USA 2025 The docs at Critter Fixer lend a helping paw to a variety of canine clients. Fifteen small-town celebrity chihuahuas need updated shots after one of their own becomes ill, an adorable puppy steals hearts around the clinic, and another young dog has an unusually large growth. Dr. Hodges helps an Alaskan malamute get its travel papers and attempts to bring a Pomeranian back from the brink. The docs leap into action, trying to save a canine bit by a venomous snake, and perform an emergency C-section to deliver five bulldog puppies., (dokument)

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Ethical Every Day
programme.desc: Rising temperatures are changing marine life. Sushi chains introduce unfamiliar fish, and researchers seek to breed species that can endure higher temperatures. This time, living with a warming sea.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Backstage Japan
programme.desc: Visit one of Japan's engineering marvels, an auto and train bridge spanning six islands, and meet the dedicated crew working to keep it as good as new for the next 200 years.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Core Kyoto
programme.desc: In recent years, Kyoto Buddhist temples have fewer parishioners and are searching for ways to make Buddhist teachings relevant to modern times, ensuring the continuance of their places of worship.

programme.title: NEWSROOM TOKYO
programme.desc: NEWSROOM TOKYO dives deeper into the day's news with insight and analysis, from the perspective of Japan and the rest of Asia. We put a spotlight on what you need to know to understand the issues.

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: In 2025, Otani Akira's book "The Night of Baba Yaga" won the UKs prestigious Dagger prize for crime fiction in translation-a first for a Japanese author. She shares the inspiration behind her work.

programme.title: MATSURI: The Heartbeat of Japan
programme.desc: The highlight of Onabare is nerikomi, which involves the careful wielding of a long, heavy pole. This follows the parade of a portable shrine through the streets with performances along the way.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE
programme.desc: A group of anglers stand in a fast-moving, undulating river at the foot of a rugged cliff. They use "drifting mosquito hooks" to fish for a summer delicacy that was a favorite of the Edo townspeople.

programme.title: Hometown Stories
programme.desc: On New Year's Eve, families in northeast Japan are visited by monster-like figures called namahage. We follow a group of men trying to keep up their proud tradition as the local population dwindles.

programme.title: Japanology Plus
programme.desc: Our bodies are home to trillions of bacteria that influence our physical health and mental well-being. We explore Japan's relationship with fermented foods and "chokatsu" or gut-related activities.

programme.desc: This doctor can change the future of lung cancer, the cancer that causes the most deaths. We follow him as he pursues new cancer treatment at the head of a team of the world's best in Toronto, Canada.

programme.title: Dining with the Chef mini
programme.desc: Traditional techniques and resourceful recipes in just 5 minutes! Chefs Saito and Rika present their unique approaches to cooking delicious Japanese food.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Design X Stories
programme.desc: Today's theme: Bodies. As AI, digital and virtual spaces take over, thinking about physical bodies is more important than ever. Explore the role of designs which are rooted in human physicality.

programme.title: Story Land
programme.desc: Leading actors take turns as solo storytellers to act and recite traditional folk tales loved in Japan for centuries. Watch out, too, for the delightful illustrations!

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: JAPANESE FIREWORKS TRUTH
programme.desc: Japanese fireworks have long enchanted people with their spherical shape and range of colors. We trace the rise of fireworks in Japan and also examine the 400-year-old mystery of the senko hanabi.

programme.title: CINEMATIC JOURNEY
programme.desc: Kyle Card hikes along the 1000km trail following the Pacific Coast in northern Japanwhere he discovers local lifestyles, stunning nature, traces of the area's 2011 disaster, and resilient people.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE(4)
programme.desc: With its splendid branches and white plum blossoms, this famous painting is known for captivating Van Gogh. Discover why people were able to tell this was a specific tree at Kameido Umeyashiki.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: BOSAI
programme.desc: A major Tokyo quake could leave many stranded in Marunouchi, one of Japan's leading business districts. We'll examine its vast energy network protecting people from disasters and power outages.

programme.desc: Morinaga Kunihiko (Fashion designer)visits Amami Oshima, Kagoshima. Priestesses on Amami wore patchwork robes with triangular butterfly designs, intended to protect the wearer from unseen spirits.
